MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-10-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Michael Edward Adams, Esq., LAW OFFICES OF MICHAEL E. ADAMS, (650) 599-9463, for THOMAS E. SINKIEWICZ and GAYLE A. SINKIEWICZ, et. al Plaintiffs/Opposing party
Kevin Hall, Esq., SMITH LLP, (510) 273-8880, for WILLIAM SCHOFIELD, Defendant/Moving party

Plaintiff contests the Courts tentative ruling.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: Plaintiff's request to file a supplemental brief is denied. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT WILLIAM SCHOFIELD'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT

Defendant's Motion for Summary Judgment is GRANTED. Moving party shifted its burden. Opposition failed to create triable issue of fact with competent admissible evidence regarding statute of limitations. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: W. Trupek, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-24-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances by any attorney, any party or any interested party.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT WILLIAM SCHOFIELD DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges facts to overcome Defendant's legal arguments regarding statute of limitations. Request for Judicial notice is granted to the extent that the Court takes notice of the existence of the prior lawsuit, but not the content of the filings in that action. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)
